title: Ich denke oft an Piroschka
writer: Hugo Hartung, Per Schwenzen, Joachim Wedekind
actors: Liselotte Pulver, Gunnar Möller, Wera Frydtberg
plot: Andreas, a young German student, comes to Hungary on an exchange programme. In the Hungarian village he falls in love with the stationmaster's daughter Piroschka and spends much of his time with her. They have an enchanting summer...
